rules.name: Allow NPM Registry HTTP
rules.description: Allow HTTP access to NPM registry and related services
rules.traffic: http_request_host contains 'registry.npmjs.org' or http_request_host contains 'registry.yarnpkg.com' or http_request_host contains 'npmjs.com' or http_request_host contains 'yarnpkg.com'

rules.name: Allow GitHub HTTP
rules.description: Allow HTTP access to GitHub services

rules.name: Allow OpenAI API HTTP
rules.description: Allow HTTP access to OpenAI API endpoints

rules.name: Allow Cloudflare API HTTP
rules.description: Allow HTTP access to Cloudflare API and Worker services
rules.traffic: http_request_host contains 'cloudflare.com' or http_request_host contains 'workers.dev' or http_request_host contains 'cloudflareclient.com'
